$description: Shakes vertical layer. Inherits saturday-core/Tokens.json in full — this file defines ONLY the copper accent + bar-app component layer on top of it.

accent-shakes.$description: Copper — the vertical's sole primary chromatic signal: ingredient-chip measurement text, primary CTA, shaker-tin material base

accent-shakes-light.$description: Copper Light — highlight tone: hover states, gradient tops on metallic surfaces, 3D rim light. Never a second competing accent.

accent-shakes-wash.$description: Whisper-faint selected/active ingredient row background — the only tinted background permitted on this vertical

accent-shakes-glow.$description: Box-shadow glow for hover/focus states and the shaker's emissive rim pass

recipe-card.$description: Chamfered panel (--chamfer-compact, 8px cut), --color-bg-base fill, 1px hairline border, 24px padding. Title + category micro-label + ingredient chips + Inter method summary.

ingredient-chip.$description: Pill (999px), 1px hairline border, Elms Sans 11px uppercase weight 500. Ingredient name in --color-text-main, measurement portion in --accent-shakes.

measurement-label.$description: Elms Sans 12-14px weight 600, --accent-shakes color, tabular figures, not uppercase-transformed.

flavour-pairing-line.$description: 1px connecting line in --accent-shakes-light at 40% opacity between two ingredient nodes; brightens to full opacity on hover. Direct lines only, never orthogonal routing.

com.saturdayservices.suite.note: This file defines ONLY the Shakes accent + component layer. Merge with saturday-core/Tokens.json for the full token set.
